description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 5th; Slot wrists; Price 4,000 gp; Weight 3 lbs. DESCRIPTION Constructed of blackened steel, these vambraces augment the protection granted to the inquisitor by the protection judgment. While under that judgmentâs effects, the inquisitor gains a sacred bonus both to CMD and on checks made to cast spells defensively. This bonus is equal to the sacred bonus the judgement grants to AC. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, shield of faith; Special creator must be an inquisitor with access to the protection judgment; Cost 2,000 gp.
